title: AI Engineer (n8n)
company_focus: Recruitment and staffing services for tech clients
description:
Job description

At TechBiz Global, we are providing recruitment service to
our TOP clients from our portfolio. We are currently looking
for a Business Development Executive to join one of our
clients' team. If you're looking for an exciting opportunity
to grow in a innovative environment, this could be the
perfect fit for you.



The AI Engineer (n8n) will be responsible for designing,
integrating, and automating business processed using AI
agents, workflows and data pipelines, primarily using the
n8n platform. The role requires hands-on technical
expertise, collaboration with cross-functional teams, and
the ability to communicate technical concepts clearly.





Job requirements

- 3-5 years of experience as an AI Engineer, AI and Automation
  Engineer, or similar role.
- Proven hands-on experience with the n8n automation platform,
  LLMs, Vector DBs,

Postgres, etc.

- Strong knowledge of data integration and workflow
  automation.
- Experience with REST APIs, webhooks, and various automation
  tools.
- Familiarity with on-premise deployments and/or DevOps
  practices is an advantage.
- Excellent communication and collaboration skills.
- Ability to work effectively as an offshore team member
  within a distributed organization.



Role Description

- Lead the development, refinement and management of workflows
  utilizing n8n, LLMs,

custom ML modelling, vector DBs, Postgres, python scripts
and so on.

- Good command on RAG pipelines and Agentic RAG systems
- Mastery in Python and SQL
- Experienced working with data engineers, analysts, and
  business stakeholders to

understand automation requirements..

- Create and maintain technical documentation all solutions.
- Foster clear and proactive communication with local and
  global teams to ensure seamless

project delivery.



RELATIONSHIIPS, FREQUENCY OF INTERACTION:

Internal

(interaction within the organization)

- Daily collaboration with Data & AI team members for
  requirements gathering and solution delivery.
- Regular updates to project managers and technical leads on
  automation progress and challenges.
- Weekly alignment meetings with cross-functional project
  teams.



External

- Ad-hoc communication with technology vendors and platform
  support for troubleshooting and optimization.
- Frequent Client interactions for requirement clarification
  and deployment support, as needed.
responsibilities: Design, integrate, and automate business processes using AI agents, workflows, and data pipelines with n8n platform
Lead development and management of workflows utilizing n8n, LLMs, custom ML modeling, vector databases, and Python scripts
Build and maintain RAG pipelines and Agentic RAG systems
Collaborate with data engineers, analysts, and business stakeholders to understand automation requirements
Create and maintain technical documentation for all solutions
Communicate proactively with local and global teams for seamless project delivery
Interact with clients for requirement clarification and deployment support
use_cases: Business process automation using AI agents
Workflow automation and data pipeline integration
RAG-based information retrieval and question answering systems
Agentic AI systems for enterprise automation
Custom ML model integration for business processes
ai_classification_reasoning:
This role involves hands-on work building AI systems
including RAG pipelines, agentic RAG systems, and workflows
with LLMs. The engineer will directly design and implement
AI agents and automation solutions using n8n, LLMs, and
vector databases.
